about.title: We empower the
about.story: 1-Glance was born from a simple realization: information isn't power—retrieval is. Our mission is to eliminate the friction between data and decision-making, providing a sophisticated layer of intelligence that organizes the world's most complex document ecosystems.

footer.tagline: Empowering the digital curator through sophisticated document intelligence and role-based excellence.
